data.title: Wiggle Car - Ride on Toy for Ages 3 and Up - Toddler Ride on Toys with no Batteries, Gears, or Pedals Just Twist, Wiggle, and

features: WIGGLE CAR RIDE ON - Kids can simply twist
and go in this toddler car that has no gears
or pedals for a quiet and entertaining activity year-round. The riding toys are designed to stimulate your child's imagination and creativity.
DEVELOPS MOTOR SKILLS - The ride on car helps your child develop and refine motor skills like balancing
and steering. The Lil’ Rider kids ride on toys are made with a low base with a double triangle structure for secure riding.
INDOOR OR OUTDOOR - Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use
or tile for hours of outdoor or indoor play. Note
cars for kids are not recommended for use on wood floors.

PRODUCT DETAILS - Materials: Plastic. Dimensions: (L) 30" x (W) 13.5" x (H) 16". Weight Capacity: 110lbs. For Children 3 Years and up. Intended to be Used under Direct Supervision of an Adult. Do not Use on Wood Floors. Color: Blue and Black.

relatedProducts.Title: Radio Flyer Cyclone, For Ages 3-7, Arm-Powered Ride On, 16" Wheels, 360-degree Spins, Forward/Reverse Action, Ergonomic Seat
relatedProducts.Features: ARM-POWERED ACTION: Kids control the fun on the Radio Flyer Cyclone using comfort hand grips to zoom forward, roll in reverse, and spin 360 degrees - building coordination and gross motor skills. | SMOOTH, SPINNING FUN: Large 16" wheels deliver a smooth ride on sidewalks, driveways, and indoor or outdoor surfaces, while the rear caster unlocks easy spin action for nonstop thrills on flat, smooth surfaces. | COMFORT THAT LASTS: The ergonomic seat and frame support kids rides, while comfort hand grips guide every twist, turn, and spin. Perfect for long days of play. | BUILT FOR ADVENTURE: A solid steel frame delivers durability for years of classic Radio Flyer fun. Recommended for ages 3-7. 69 lb maximum weight capacity. | BELOVED ICON OF PLAY: For over a century, Radio Flyer has inspired joyful play with wagons, trikes, and more. As a Certified B Corp, we create lasting products that spark imagination while caring for future generations.

relatedProducts.Product_Description: Meet the Radio Flyer Cyclone - an arm-powered ride on toy that lets kids control the fun. Using the comfort hand grips, riders control every move, building coordination and confidence with each spin. Big 16" wheels keep the ride smooth on sidewalks and driveways, and the rear caster adds easy 360-degree spin action. Zoom forward, roll in reverse, and whirl around for endless thrills on flat, smooth surfaces. Designed for comfort and built to last, the Cyclone features an ergonomic seat and frame with a solid steel build. Recommended for ages 3-7 with a 69 lb maximum weight capacity. As a Certified B Corp, Radio Flyer is proud to create products that spark imagination while helping preserve the planet for future generations.

Item_Details.Manufacturer Warranty Description: The product warranty is good within one year from the date of purchase. A dated sales receipt for proof of purchase is required. A two year warranty policy will be provided to all customers who register their product at radioflyer.com.
